languages.text: "Они не тычут в меня пальцем и не призывают сжечь... эти мон-каи сломаны".
languages.translation_comment:
Мы несколько раз тыкнули в НПС, а они не обращают на нас внимания.
(универсально для Ирлиэт, Маражай)

traits.locale_text: "Они не тычут в меня пальцем и не призывают сжечь... эти мон-каи сломаны".

languages.text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."
languages.original_text: "Они не тычут в меня пальцем и не призывают сжечь... эти мон-каи сломаны".

traits.locale_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."
"They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."
"They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

languages.text: "Sie machen weder Gesten in meine Richtung, noch fordern sie meine Verbrennung ... Diese Chem-Pan-Sey sind gebrochen."
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: "Sie machen weder Gesten in meine Richtung, noch fordern sie meine Verbrennung ... Diese Chem-Pan-Sey sind gebrochen."

languages.text: “他们居然没有冲我指指点点、嚷嚷着要把我烧死……这些猴子脑子都坏掉了。”
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: “他们居然没有冲我指指点点、嚷嚷着要把我烧死……这些猴子脑子都坏掉了。”

languages.text: « Aucune gesticulation, aucun appel au bûcher... Ces mon-keigh ne sont pas normaux. »
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: « Aucune gesticulation, aucun appel au bûcher... Ces mon-keigh ne sont pas normaux. »

languages.text: «No me hacen gestos obscenos ni piden a gritos que me quemen en una hoguera... Estos mon-keigh están rotos».
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: «No me hacen gestos obscenos ni piden a gritos que me quemen en una hoguera... Estos mon-keigh están rotos».

languages.text: "Bana el kol hareketi yapmıyorlar, yakılmam için bağırmıyorlar... Bu mon-keighler bozuk."
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: "Bana el kol hareketi yapmıyorlar, yakılmam için bağırmıyorlar... Bu mon-keighler bozuk."

languages.text: 「彼らは私に向かって手振りや叫び声を上げ、私を焼き殺すよう求めていない…このモンケィは壊れている」
languages.original_text: "They are not gesticulating at me and clamouring for me to be burned... These mon-keigh are broken."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らは私に向かって手振りや叫び声を上げ、私を焼き殺すよう求めていない…このモンケィは壊れている」
